message:
Harden stores and expand history client with persistent storage

Major expansion of the history client to support persistent history
with improved error handling. Harden referral and roadmap stores
against edge cases, with corresponding test coverage increases.
Includes beads config cleanup and issue tracker metadata sync.

- history/client: 246-line expansion for persistent history + error handling
- referral-store, roadmap-store: defensive hardening (11 lines each)
- roadmap vote route: 4-line fix for edge cases
- referral apply, roadmap vote, history client, referral-store,
  roadmap-store: expanded test suites (+185 test lines total)
- .beads: config cleanup and issues.jsonl sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
